title: D1.7-Final AECPG contractual framework and practical solutions catalogue (short design guide version)
description: A concise design guide for practitioners presenting a contractual framework and catalogue of practical solutions to support the voluntary provision of agri-environmental-climate public goods in EU agriculture and forestry. It introduces model contract types, decision trees, and key features for result-based, collective, land-tenure, and value-chain schemes under the CONSOLE Horizon 2020 project.
